User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user's link between authentication and their profile data.

email.description: The user's email address, used for lookups.

profilePath.description: The full Firestore path to the user's detailed profile document (e.g., 'tenants/safeviate/personnel/xyz123').

ExternalOrganization.title: External Organization
ExternalOrganization.description: An external company that participates in quality audits.

parentRegulationCode.description: The code of the parent regulation, if this is a sub-regulation.

FindingLevel.title: Finding Level
FindingLevel.description: Represents a single audit finding level with its associated color.

color.description: The hex color code for the background of this level.

foregroundColor.description: The hex color code for the text of this level.

FindingLevelsSettings.title: Finding Levels Settings
FindingLevelsSettings.description: Represents the audit finding levels settings for a tenant.

ComplianceRequirement.title: Compliance Requirement
ComplianceRequirement.description: A single regulatory or internal compliance requirement.

regulationCode.description: The official code for the regulation (e.g., '141.02.2').

parentRegulationCode.description: The code of the parent regulation, if this is a sub-regulation.

regulationStatement.description: The short, official title or heading of the regulation.

technicalStandard.description: The full, detailed text body of the regulation.

companyReference.description: A reference to the internal manual or procedure (e.g., 'Ops Manual, Sec 4.2.1').

responsibleManagerId.description: The ID of the manager responsible for this requirement.

SafetyReport.title: Safety Report
SafetyReport.description: Represents a single safety report, from initial filing to final closure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the safety report.

reportNumber.description: A unique, sequential, human-readable report number (e.g., FLT-001).

reportType.description: The category of the event being reported.

status.description: The current stage of the report in its lifecycle.

submittedBy.description: The user ID of the person who filed the report.

submittedByName.description: The name of the user who filed the report.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp of when the report was submitted.

closedDate.description: Timestamp of when the report was closed.

isAnonymous.description: If true, the submitter's identity is hidden.

location.description: The location where the event occurred.

aircraftId.description: The ID of the aircraft involved, if any.

description.description: A detailed narrative of the event.

phaseOfFlight.description: For flight operations, the phase of flight when the event occurred.

systemOrComponent.description: For defect reports, the specific system or component involved.

departmentId.description: The department ID responsible for handling the report.

occurrenceCategory.description: The official ICAO occurrence category assigned during triage.

eventClassification.description: The final classification of the event.

ManagementOfChange.title: Management of Change
ManagementOfChange.description: Represents a Management of Change (MOC) record.

mocNumber.description: A unique, sequential, human-readable MOC number (e.g., MOC-001).

title.description: A clear, concise title for the change.

description.description: A detailed explanation of what is changing.

reason.description: The reason why the change is being made.

scope.description: Who and what will be affected by the change.

proposingDepartmentId.description: The ID of the department proposing the change.

responsiblePersonId.description: The ID of the person responsible for the proposal.

proposedBy.description: The user ID of the person who initiated the change.

proposalDate.description: Timestamp of when the MOC was proposed.

Aircraft.title: Aircraft
Aircraft.description: Represents an aircraft used for training.

organizationId.description: ID of the associated external organization, if applicable.

MaintenanceLog.title: MaintenanceLog
MaintenanceLog.description: Represents a maintenance log entry for an aircraft.

reference.description: Internal or external reference number for the work.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Represents a role within the application.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a Tenant on the system.

enabledMenus.description: A list of menu/submenu hrefs enabled for this tenant.

definition.description: Stores a link between a Firebase Auth user and their profile document.
Stores tenant configuration and authorized features.
Stores external companies involved in quality audits.
Stores maintenance log entries for a specific aircraft.
